title: Code Review
content:
### Review Process

When a PR is opened, collaborators can review the changes line-by-line. Leave comments, ask questions, and suggest improvements before the PR is merged.

### Commenting

Click the **+** icon next to any line in the **Files changed** tab to add a comment. Use the **Review changes** button to submit a summary review.

### Suggesting Changes

Use the suggestion syntax to propose exact code edits:

```suggestion
console.log('hello world');
```

Accepted suggestions are committed automatically.

### Review States

- **Comment** — General feedback without blocking
- **Approve** — Changes are ready to merge
- **Request changes** — Must be addressed before merging

### Team Reviews & Code Owners

- **Team reviews** — Assign an entire team as reviewer, one member's approval counts
- **CODEOWNERS file** — Automatically request review from specific users/teams when certain files are modified

Place `.github/CODEOWNERS`:
```
# Lines matching patterns will request review
*.js    @js-team
/docs/  @docs-team
```

quiz.question: Which review state blocks a PR from being merged?
What file automatically assigns reviewers based on file paths?
